prompt: Create a close-up chibi anime mascot illustration on a clean white background, featuring a cute pink-haired anime girl centered in the frame. She has oversized sparkling gradient eyes in pink, purple, and golden tones, a tiny smiling mouth, soft blush, and a rounded chibi face. Her pastel pink hair is styled into two large fluffy high twin-tails with curled ends, thick side locks, straight bangs, and small gold hair clips on the upper right side. She wears a white fantasy idol-style outfit with gold trim, shoulder armor-like accents, black collar details, and delicate pink decorative elements. Both small hands are visible at chest height, holding a large stylized triangular logo/sign directly in front of her body: a thick rounded triangle outline in vivid hot pink with a black edge/shadow and an open triangular cutout in the center. The composition is tightly cropped, showing the top of the head partially cut off and the twin-tails extending to both sides, with the logo occupying the lower center. Use polished Japanese anime key visual style, clean line art, soft cel shading, glossy highlights, pastel colors, high detail in the eyes and hair, cute cheerful mood, no text, no watermark, no extra characters.
